name: Papaya and Crabmeat Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crab meat and celery.
2. Chill the mixture.
3. Slice the lime in half and add the juice from one of the halves to the crabmeat and celery.
4. Add the slivered almonds.
5. Pile the mixture into the papayas.
6. Garnish with wedges cut from the remaining half of the lime.
